notes:
vMLX 1.5.57 checkpoint release

Highlights:
- Fresh signed and notarized checkpoint build so GitHub, updater, download page, and PyPI can move past the stale 1.5.56 release surface.
- Carries the current vMLX Python engine runtime fixes for Gemma4 QAT/JANG_4M source smokes, Gemma4 tool-parser modality sentinel cleanup, Qwen/N2 Responses/tool-call tracing work, cache/L2 proof hooks, and current panel/runtime packaging surface.
- Keeps release manifest truth visible: this is a usable checkpoint release, not a claim that every open runtime/model-family row is production-green.

Verification:
- Built Sequoia and Tahoe arm64 DMGs from vmlx 1.5.57 source and bundled Python engine version 1.5.57.
- Sequoia DMG accepted by Apple notarization id c62866cf-b8f6-41eb-a6b6-f86b1e585377, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Tahoe DMG accepted by Apple notarization id 49b40858-e795-4704-9578-b55a84fe6dfb, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Checkpoint prepackage manifest was generated with explicit override because the full live model matrix still has open rows.

Known follow-up:
- Nex/N2 Pro JANGTQ runtime/cache/API/UI proof remains active; N2 JANG_1L is not claimed by this checkpoint lane.
- Gemma MXFP/JANG media/audio/video proof beyond current QAT and installed-app rows remains active.
- MiMo JANG/JANGTQ artifact/logit/quant-contract and UI/media proof remains open; replacement artifact work is separate.
- Same-model Responses direct/gateway/tunnel raw SSE parity for content deltas, function-call argument deltas, output_index correctness, and no raw XML/tool leaks remains critical across model families.
- Installed-app full model-family matrix is not fully green; this checkpoint is signed/notarized to unblock users while proof continues.

DMG SHA256:
- Sequoia: 7bfa301b65d499dd51655b2c0aade4b8ffdf299ec798027be5a688d378885f1e
- Tahoe: bbebd29d8e9d9ad4de7fbcb460c58390a114f03b8f38dd66f8733601238e4eed
